remarks.para: The CommonModule library contains classes for standard Task Transforms and Task Source Actions.
The LJC.CommonModuleLib library is part of the LJC.DataTransform solution.

member.name: P:LJCCommonModuleLib.ColumnMapping.MapTypeID
member.summary: Gets or sets the MapType ID value.

member.name: P:LJCCommonModuleLib.ColumnMapping.SourceColumn
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Source" column value.

member.name: P:LJCCommonModuleLib.ColumnMapping.TargetColumn
member.summary: Gets or sets the "Target" column value.

member.name: T:LJCCommonModuleLib.ColumnMappings
member.summary: Represents a collection of ColumnMap objects.

member.name: M:LJCCommonModuleLib.ColumnMappings.Add(LJCDataTransformDAL.LayoutColumn,LJCDataTransformDAL.LayoutColumn,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates and adds the object from the provided values.
member.returns: A reference to the added item.

member.name: T:LJCCommonModuleLib.CommonModule
member.summary: Executes an Action for all sources of a task.
